name: Do You Remember? Toward Memory-Centric Multimodal AI
summary: arXiv:2607.11919v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Human memory is reconstructive, not a faithful recording. Current multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) lack this capability: they process images through a froze...
description: arXiv:2607.11919v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Human memory is reconstructive, not a faithful recording. Current multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) lack this capability: they process images through a frozen visual encoder, produce a one-shot text output, and discard internal representations. We present DoYouRemember, a three-stage architecture introducing reconstructive memory into MLLMs: (1) a VQ-VAE...
author: Xuguang Yu, Weigang Zheng, Minyue Yu
